source: Creator Monetize — Funnels (Value Video, Call, Live Expert) + Page Structures + Pre-Launch

value_video.name: Value Video Funnel
value_video.description: Pre-recorded value video replaces live selling. Two variants: Straight Sale and Book-A-Call.

sections: Urgency + Stage 5 Awareness Headline + Dream Outcome
Video + Who/What/Price + Join Now + Social proof
Secondary Headline + Product Image + 6 fascination bullets
What You Get Inside (repeat per product)
Full Value Stack with price slash
sales_page.ps_section_template: P.S. - From {name}. If you skip to the bottom: opening spots for {PRODUCT_NAME} for {X type person}. Usually {FULL_PRICE}, today only {CURRENT_PRICE}. {GUARANTEE_LENGTH} days guarantee. Click button below.

call_funnel.name: Call Funnel
call_funnel.description: Simplest funnel — 2 pages. VSL on booking page, post-booking page reduces no-shows.
call_funnel.friction_rule: Start LOW friction (fewer questions). Only add qualifying questions when 50%+ calls are unqualified or you are fully booked.

live_expert.name: Live Expert Funnel
live_expert.description: Live presentation as conversion event. Registration → wait period with reminders → live event → sale.
post_registration_checklist: Save personal private link for date/time
Take notes, post on social media
live_expert.presentation_scripting: See sales_system.json → presentation_scripting for full 26-step structure

pre_launch.name: Pre-Launch Method
pre_launch.concept: Sell BEFORE fully built — build momentum, collect cash, prove concept

launch_types.quiet: Email list only — lower reach, more intimate, good for testing
launch_types.loud: All channels (email, social, community, ads) — maximum reach

steps: Have offer, funnel, product breakdown ready
Choose: Quiet (email list only) or Loud (all social channels)
Add 20-50% discount + frame 1-3 bonuses as 'pre-launch bonuses'
Add 3+ points of messaging on funnel about pre-launch offer
When launching: change price, adjust discount, remove pre-launch messaging

nurture_email_sequence.name: 6-Email Nurture Sequence

emails.purpose: Sell them on watching the free training
Future-pace end result (80-90%), soft product mention at end
Destroy biggest limiting belief via stories/examples/facts
Proof story — client case study showing methods work
Pure free value — best tip/tactic that makes real difference

emails.subject_formula: Where would you be if you joined 7 days ago?

nurture_email_sequence.post_sequence: Joins daily newsletter pool — treat like daily social posting
